summary: Propina Legal Bug Fix Testing - VERIFIED. The critical bug where Propina Legal was incorrectly subtracted from total has been fixed. Total a Pagar now correctly equals Subtotal + ITBIS + Propina Legal. CAMBIO only shows when amount_received > total. Business info (ALONZO CIGAR, RNC, phone, address) correctly displays in receipt endpoints.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Bill Total = Subtotal (750) + ITBIS (135) + Propina (75) = 960 ✅
TEST 2: Pay with exact amount (960) - No false CAMBIO displayed ✅
TEST 3: Receipt HTML contains ALONZO CIGAR, RNC 1-31-75577-1, 809-301-3858, Jarabacoa, 'Valido hasta', DGII ✅
TEST 4: Receipt ESC/POS contains ALONZO CIGAR, RNC 1-31-75577-1, DGII ✅
TEST 5: Database bill.total matches calculated total ✅
ThermalTicket.js CAMBIO logic correct: shows only when bill.amount_received > bill.total ✅
critical_code_review_comments: PayBillInput model correctly accepts optional itbis, propina_legal, total, amount_received from frontend (billing.py line 53-63)
pay_bill function correctly uses frontend-calculated values instead of recalculating with tip_percentage=0 (billing.py line 298-314)
Receipt HTML endpoint includes NCF expiry 'Valido hasta' and DGII footer (server.py line 876-954)
Receipt ESC/POS endpoint includes business info and DGII message (server.py line 956-1001)
ThermalTicket.js has correct CAMBIO logic: only displays when amount_received && amount_received > total (line 312)

features_verified.propina_legal_calculation: PASS - Total = Subtotal + ITBIS + Propina (not subtracted)
features_verified.cambio_display_logic: PASS - Only shows when amount_received > total
features_verified.receipt_html_business_info: PASS - ALONZO CIGAR, RNC, phone, address, NCF expiry, DGII
features_verified.bill_total_persistence: PASS - Database stores correct calculated total

context_for_next_testing_agent: Propina Legal bug fix verified. The pay_bill endpoint now accepts frontend-calculated tax values (itbis, propina_legal, total) and stores them directly rather than recalculating with tip_percentage=0. This prevents the bug where propina was zeroed out. All receipt endpoints show correct business information for ALONZO CIGAR with RNC 1-31-75577-1.
